title: Why AI Models Pause to Think: Test Time Compute Explained
summary: IBM Technology explains test-time compute as a technique where AI models allocate deliberate thinking steps during inference to solve harder problems. Chain of thought and reasoning models use this approach to boost accuracy by having LLMs pause and think through problems rather than generating answers immediately.
